sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42744" key="e)ruqi/bh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρυθίβη</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρῠ´θ-ιος</orth>, said to be Rhodian for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐρυσίβ-η, -ιος</foreign> (q.v.).</entryFree>
